/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 0.11.0 -o ../../bin/libggml.0.11.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/AqibMumtaz/Aqib Mumtaz/BitLogix/qwen-asr-local/qwen3-asr-local/llama.cpp/build/bin" ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.11.0.dylib
